storeInfo.storeDescription: A personal collection of tools I've built. Feel free to use them.

swList.name: AutoFlow
swList.description: Automate repetitive tasks with a visual workflow builder. Connect apps, trigger actions, run silent.

swList.name: DataLens
swList.description: Turn raw data into clear insights. Connect any database, build dashboards, share results.

swList.name: ShieldGuard
swList.description: Audit your infrastructure. Detect vulnerabilities, map exposure, generate reports.
